summary: Closed SIM-004 after PR #16 merged into main. The reviewed deterministic RNG domain implementation is integrated at main merge commit 63d21336d0de313ee33c0a17f1ce2a665c72e34f, and dependency-ready follow-up tasks on this branch are SIM-003 and SIM-006.

tests_run.result: PR #16 MERGED at 2026-06-24T07:44:38Z with merge commit 63d21336d0de313ee33c0a17f1ce2a665c72e34f; Quality/Web and Windows Desktop Smoke checks both succeeded.
SIM-004 was ACCEPTED on main before closure; after this closure branch it is CLOSED.

decisions: Close SIM-004 only after confirming the accepted implementation entered main through PR #16.
Do not start SIM-003 or SIM-006 in this closure commit.
risks: Root pnpm format:check still omits packages/sim-core and packages/protocol globs; SIM-004 itself used targeted touched-file Prettier checks.
